query:
SELECT DISTINCT title.title, aka_name.name, company_name.name AS company_name, char_name.name AS character_name, role_type.role, keyword.keyword, movie_info.info, movie_info_idx.info AS movie_info_idx_info
FROM title,
    aka_title,
    cast_info,
    char_name,
    role_type,
    movie_companies,
    company_name,
    company_type,
    movie_keyword,
    keyword,
    movie_info,
    movie_info_idx,
    aka_name,
    name
WHERE title.id = aka_title.movie_id AND
      cast_info.movie_id = title.id AND
      cast_info.person_role_id = char_name.id AND
      cast_info.role_id = role_type.id AND
      movie_companies.movie_id = title.id AND
      movie_companies.company_id = company_name.id AND
      movie_companies.company_type_id = company_type.id AND
      movie_keyword.movie_id = title.id AND
      movie_keyword.keyword_id = keyword.id AND
      movie_info.movie_id = title.id AND
      movie_info_idx.movie_id = title.id AND
      aka_name.person_id = cast_info.person_id AND
      aka_name.name = name.name AND
      (title.production_year = 1999 OR title.production_year = 2000 OR title.production_year = 2001) AND
      (company_name.country_code = 'US' OR company_name.country_code = 'UK') AND
      (role_type.role LIKE '%Actor%' OR role_type.role LIKE '%Actress%') AND
      (keyword.keyword = 'comedy' OR keyword.keyword = 'drama') AND
      movie_info.info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'rating') AND
      movie_info_idx.info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'votes') AND
      movie_info.info::numeric > 7 AND
      movie_info_idx.info::numeric > 1000
ORDER BY title.title ASC
LIMIT 10;

SELECT DISTINCT t.title, t.production_year, ak.name, cn.name, mk.keyword, mi.info
FROM title t
JOIN aka_title at ON t.id = at.movie_id AND t.production_year = at.production_year AND at.kind_id = t.kind_id
JOIN cast_info ci ON ci.movie_id = t.id AND ci.nr_order > 10 AND ci.role_id = ci.person_role_id
JOIN name n ON n.id = ci.person_id AND n.gender = 'M' AND n.name_pcode_nf = n.name_pcode_cf
JOIN aka_name ak ON ak.person_id = n.id AND ak.name_pcode_nf = n.name_pcode_nf AND ak.surname_pcode = n.surname_pcode
JOIN char_name cn ON cn.id = ci.person_role_id AND cn.name_pcode_nf = cn.surname_pcode
JOIN movie_keyword mk ON mk.movie_id = t.id AND mk.keyword_id = mk.id AND mk.id = mk.movie_id
JOIN keyword k ON k.id = mk.keyword_id AND k.phonetic_code = mk.keyword_id
JOIN movie_info mi ON mi.movie_id = t.id AND mi.info_type_id = mi.id AND mi.note IS NOT NULL
WHERE t.production_year > 2000 AND t.kind_id = 1 AND mi.info LIKE '%action%' AND cn.name LIKE 'A%'
ORDER BY t.production_year DESC
LIMIT 10;

SELECT DISTINCT t1.title, t2.title, t3.name, t4.keyword, t5.info 
FROM title t1 
LEFT JOIN aka_title t2 ON t1.id = t2.movie_id AND t2.production_year = 2000
LEFT JOIN cast_info t3 ON t1.id = t3.movie_id AND t3.role_id IN (SELECT id FROM role_type WHERE role = 'actor')
LEFT JOIN movie_keyword t4 ON t1.id = t4.movie_id AND t4.keyword_id IN (SELECT id FROM keyword WHERE keyword LIKE '%adventure%')
LEFT JOIN movie_info t5 ON t1.id = t5.movie_id AND t5.info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'rating')
WHERE t1.production_year = (SELECT MAX(production_year) FROM title WHERE kind_id = (SELECT id FROM kind_type WHERE kind = 'movie'))
AND t1.kind_id = (SELECT id FROM kind_type WHERE kind = 'movie')
AND EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM movie_companies mc WHERE mc.movie_id = t1.id AND mc.company_type_id = (SELECT id FROM company_type WHERE kind = 'production'))
AND NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM movie_link ml WHERE ml.movie_id = t1.id AND ml.link_type_id = (SELECT id FROM link_type WHERE link = 'remake'))
ORDER BY t5.info DESC LIMIT 10;

SELECT DISTINCT t.title, n.name, k.keyword, mt.info, rt.role 
FROM (
    SELECT title.id AS title_id, title.title, title.production_year 
    FROM title 
    WHERE title.production_year > 2000 AND title.production_year < 2020
) t 
JOIN (
    SELECT DISTINCT movie_companies.movie_id, company_name.name AS company_name 
    FROM movie_companies 
    JOIN company_name ON movie_companies.company_id = company_name.id 
    WHERE movie_companies.company_type_id = 1
) mc 
    ON t.title_id = mc.movie_id 
JOIN (
    SELECT movie_keyword.movie_id, keyword.keyword 
    FROM movie_keyword 
    JOIN keyword ON movie_keyword.keyword_id = keyword.id
) k 
    ON t.title_id = k.movie_id 
JOIN (
    SELECT movie_info.movie_id, movie_info.info 
    FROM movie_info 
    WHERE movie_info.info_type_id = 3
) mt 
    ON t.title_id = mt.movie_id 
JOIN (
    SELECT cast_info.movie_id, name.name, role_type.role 
    FROM cast_info 
    JOIN name ON cast_info.person_id = name.id 
    JOIN role_type ON cast_info.role_id = role_type.id 
    WHERE cast_info.nr_order < 10
) n 
    ON t.title_id = n.movie_id
WHERE t.title_id IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT title.id 
    FROM title 
    WHERE title.production_year > 2000 AND title.production_year < 2020
) 
AND mc.movie_id IN (
    SELECT movie_companies.movie_id 
    FROM movie_companies 
    JOIN company_name ON movie_companies.company_id = company_name.id
) 
AND k.movie_id IN (
    SELECT movie_keyword.movie_id 
    FROM movie_keyword 
    JOIN keyword ON movie_keyword.keyword_id = keyword.id
) 
AND mt.movie_id IN (
    SELECT movie_info.movie_id 
    FROM movie_info 
    WHERE movie_info.info_type_id = 3
) 
AND n.movie_id IN (
    SELECT cast_info.movie_id 
    FROM cast_info 
    JOIN name ON cast_info.person_id = name.id 
    JOIN role_type ON cast_info.role_id = role_type.id
)
LIMIT 10;

SELECT DISTINCT t.title, t.production_year, t.imdb_index, c.name AS company_name, k.keyword, i.info, n.name AS person_name
FROM (
    SELECT title.id AS title_id, title.title, title.production_year, title.imdb_index, title.kind_id
    FROM title, kind_type
    WHERE title.kind_id = kind_type.id AND kind_type.kind = 'movie'
) t
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT movie_companies.movie_id, company_name.name
    FROM movie_companies
    INNER JOIN company_name ON movie_companies.company_id = company_name.id
    WHERE movie_companies.company_type_id = (SELECT id FROM company_type WHERE kind = 'production')
) c ON t.title_id = c.movie_id
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT movie_keyword.movie_id, keyword.keyword
    FROM movie_keyword
    INNER JOIN keyword ON movie_keyword.keyword_id = keyword.id
    WHERE keyword.keyword LIKE 'action%'
) k ON t.title_id = k.movie_id
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT movie_info.movie_id, movie_info.info
    FROM movie_info
    WHERE movie_info.info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'rating') AND movie_info.info::float > 7.0
) i ON t.title_id = i.movie_id
INNER JOIN (
    SELECT cast_info.movie_id, name.name
    FROM cast_info
    INNER JOIN name ON cast_info.person_id = name.id
    WHERE cast_info.role_id = (SELECT id FROM role_type WHERE role = 'actor')
) n ON t.title_id = n.movie_id
WHERE t.production_year > 2000 AND t.production_year < 2010
AND t.title_id IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT movie_id
    FROM movie_info_idx
    WHERE info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'votes') AND info::integer > 10000
)
ORDER BY t.production_year DESC
LIMIT 10;

SELECT * 
FROM (
    SELECT title.id AS movie_id, 
           title.title AS movie_title, 
           name.name AS actor_name, 
           company_name.name AS company_name, 
           keyword.keyword AS movie_keyword
    FROM title
    INNER JOIN cast_info ON title.id = cast_info.movie_id
    INNER JOIN name ON cast_info.person_id = name.id
    INNER JOIN movie_companies ON title.id = movie_companies.movie_id
    INNER JOIN company_name ON movie_companies.company_id = company_name.id
    INNER JOIN movie_keyword ON title.id = movie_keyword.movie_id
    INNER JOIN keyword ON movie_keyword.keyword_id = keyword.id
    WHERE title.production_year = (SELECT MAX(title.production_year) FROM title)
      AND title.kind_id = (
          SELECT id FROM kind_type WHERE kind = 'movie'
      )
      AND company_name.country_code = (SELECT country_code FROM company_name WHERE id = 1)
) AS subquery
WHERE subquery.actor_name LIKE 'A%'
  AND subquery.company_name IS NOT NULL
LIMIT 10;

SELECT DISTINCT t.title, t.production_year, c.name AS company_name, p.name AS person_name, mi.info AS movie_info
FROM title t
INNER JOIN movie_companies mc ON t.id = mc.movie_id
INNER JOIN company_name c ON mc.company_id = c.id
INNER JOIN cast_info ci ON t.id = ci.movie_id
INNER JOIN name p ON ci.person_id = p.id
INNER JOIN movie_info mi ON t.id = mi.movie_id
WHERE 
    (t.production_year = 1999 OR t.production_year = 2000 OR t.production_year = 2001) AND 
    (c.name LIKE 'Warner%' OR c.name LIKE 'Paramount%') AND 
    (ci.role_id = 1 OR ci.role_id = 2 OR ci.role_id = 3) AND 
    (mi.info LIKE '%Oscar%' OR mi.info LIKE '%Award%') AND 
    (t.kind_id = (SELECT id FROM kind_type WHERE kind = 'movie')) AND 
    (mc.company_type_id = (SELECT id FROM company_type WHERE kind = 'production')) AND 
    (ci.nr_order IN (SELECT DISTINCT nr_order FROM cast_info WHERE nr_order < 10))
ORDER BY t.production_year DESC, p.name ASC
LIMIT 10;

-- Optimization Potential:
-- 1. The WHERE clause contains several complex OR conditions, which can be simplified or normalized.
-- 2. Subqueries like (SELECT id FROM kind_type WHERE kind = 'movie') and (SELECT id FROM company_type WHERE kind = 'production') are repeatedly used and could be replaced with JOINs or CTEs.
-- 3. The condition (ci.nr_order IN (SELECT DISTINCT nr_order FROM cast_info WHERE nr_order < 10)) can be optimized using a JOIN or a direct filter.
-- 4. Constant expressions like t.kind_id = (SELECT id FROM kind_type WHERE kind = 'movie') could be folded for better performance.
-- 5. Predicate pushdown could be applied to reduce intermediate result sets early in the execution plan.

SELECT DISTINCT
    t.title,
    t.production_year,
    n.name,
    cn.name AS character_name,
    mi.info AS movie_info,
    pi.info AS person_info
FROM
    (
        SELECT
            title.id AS title_id,
            title.title,
            title.production_year
        FROM
            title
        JOIN kind_type ON title.kind_id = kind_type.id
        AND kind_type.kind = 'movie'
        WHERE
            title.production_year > 2000
    ) t
JOIN cast_info ci ON t.title_id = ci.movie_id
JOIN (
        SELECT
            name.id AS person_id,
            name.name
        FROM
            name
        WHERE
            name.gender = 'm'
    ) n ON ci.person_id = n.person_id
JOIN (
        SELECT
            char_name.id AS char_name_id,
            char_name.name
        FROM
            char_name
    ) cn ON ci.person_role_id = cn.char_name_id
LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT
            movie_info.movie_id,
            movie_info.info
        FROM
            movie_info
        WHERE
            movie_info.info_type_id = (
                SELECT
                    info_type.id
                FROM
                    info_type
                WHERE
                    info_type.info = 'rating'
            )
    ) mi ON t.title_id = mi.movie_id
LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT
            person_info.person_id,
            person_info.info
        FROM
            person_info
        WHERE
            person_info.info_type_id = (
                SELECT
                    info_type.id
                FROM
                    info_type
                WHERE
                    info_type.info = 'biography'
            )
    ) pi ON n.person_id = pi.person_id
WHERE
    t.production_year > 2000
    AND ci.nr_order < 10
    AND (
        mi.info IS NOT NULL
        OR pi.info IS NOT NULL
    )
LIMIT 10;

SELECT DISTINCT t1.title, t2.name, t3.info, t4.keyword
FROM title t1
INNER JOIN cast_info t2 ON t1.id = t2.movie_id
INNER JOIN movie_info t3 ON t1.id = t3.movie_id
INNER JOIN movie_keyword t4 ON t1.id = t4.movie_id
INNER JOIN aka_title t5 ON t1.id = t5.movie_id AND t5.kind_id = 1 AND t5.production_year > 2000 AND t5.production_year < 2020
INNER JOIN name t6 ON t2.person_id = t6.id AND t6.gender = 'M' AND t6.name_pcode_nf = 'XYZ'
INNER JOIN person_info t7 ON t6.id = t7.person_id AND t7.info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'birth date')
WHERE t1.kind_id = (SELECT id FROM kind_type WHERE kind = 'movie')
AND t3.info_type_id = (SELECT id FROM info_type WHERE info = 'budget')
AND t4.keyword_id = (SELECT id FROM keyword WHERE keyword = 'thriller')
AND t1.production_year > 1990
AND t1.production_year < 2020
AND t3.info LIKE '%million%'
ORDER BY t1.production_year DESC
LIMIT 10;

SELECT DISTINCT t.title, t.production_year, n.name, mi.info, k.keyword
FROM (
    SELECT t1.id AS movie_id, t1.title, t1.production_year
    FROM title t1, title t2, title t3
    WHERE t1.kind_id = t2.kind_id AND t2.kind_id = t3.kind_id AND t1.production_year = t2.production_year
    AND t2.production_year = t3.production_year AND t1.id = t2.episode_of_id AND t2.id = t3.episode_of_id
) t
JOIN (
    SELECT ci.movie_id, ci.person_id
    FROM cast_info ci, cast_info ci2, cast_info ci3
    WHERE ci.role_id = ci2.role_id AND ci2.role_id = ci3.role_id AND ci.movie_id = ci2.movie_id
    AND ci2.movie_id = ci3.movie_id AND ci.person_id = ci2.person_id AND ci2.person_id = ci3.person_id
) ci ON t.movie_id = ci.movie_id
JOIN (
    SELECT name.id AS person_id, name.name
    FROM name, name n2, name n3
    WHERE name.name_pcode_cf = n2.name_pcode_cf AND n2.name_pcode_cf = n3.name_pcode_cf
    AND name.surname_pcode = n2.surname_pcode AND n2.surname_pcode = n3.surname_pcode
) n ON ci.person_id = n.person_id
JOIN (
    SELECT mi.movie_id, mi.info
    FROM movie_info mi, movie_info mi2
    WHERE mi.info_type_id = mi2.info_type_id AND mi.movie_id = mi2.movie_id
) mi ON t.movie_id = mi.movie_id
JOIN (
    SELECT k.keyword, mk.movie_id
    FROM keyword k, movie_keyword mk
    WHERE k.id = mk.keyword_id
) k ON t.movie_id = k.movie_id
WHERE t.production_year > 2000 AND t.production_year < 2010
AND n.name LIKE 'A%'
AND mi.info LIKE '%action%'
AND k.keyword LIKE '%hero%'
ORDER BY t.production_year DESC, t.title ASC
LIMIT 10;
